tasks.title: Create monorepo structure and contracts package
tasks.description: Set up monorepo with apps/cli, apps/mcp-server, and packages/ directories. Define all shared typed contracts: ContextItem, ContextPack, Observation, Decision, RuntimeSignal, RepoDescriptor, WorkspaceDescriptor, LanguageAnalyzer interface, Ranker interface, AgentAdapter interface. No business logic in contracts package.

tasks.title: Build CLI shell and config loader
tasks.description: Implement CLI entry point using Typer or Click. Add commands: init, index, watch, pack, decisions, memory, benchmark, mcp. Support human-readable output by default and --json flag. Load workspace.yaml and per-repo config. No API key required.

tasks.title: Bootstrap SQLite storage with FTS5
tasks.description: Implement storage-sqlite package with schema migrations, repository interfaces, FTS indexes for symbols and memory, and cache tables. Storage must be behind repository interfaces so it can be replaced.

tasks.title: Build file scanner and graph-index core
tasks.description: Implement graph-index package with file inventory, symbol graph, dependency graph, cross-file links, test mapping, and incremental re-indexing triggered by file save and git commit events.

tasks.title: Implement Python language analyzer
tasks.description: Build language-python package extracting: imports, functions, classes, FastAPI/Flask/Django endpoints, pytest test mappings, setup/config touchpoints. Output normalized symbols matching LanguageAnalyzer contract.

tasks.title: Implement Java language analyzer
tasks.description: Build language-java package extracting: packages/imports, classes/interfaces/enums, Spring controllers/services/repositories, JUnit test mappings, Maven/Gradle ownership. Output normalized symbols.

tasks.title: Implement .NET/C# language analyzer
tasks.description: Build language-dotnet package extracting: namespaces/usings, classes/interfaces/records, ASP.NET controllers/services, csproj/solution relationships, xUnit/NUnit/MSTest test mappings. Output normalized symbols.

tasks.title: Implement YAML language analyzer
tasks.description: Build language-yaml package extracting: key paths, resource kinds, CI workflow jobs/steps, Kubernetes object references, helm/chart relationships, config ownership heuristics. Output normalized symbols.

tasks.title: Build ranking engine v1
tasks.description: Implement ranking package with weighted scoring for: structural relevance, change proximity, runtime signal match, memory relevance, recency, cross-repo edge strength, test ownership proximity. Implement mode-specific tuning for review, debug, implement, and handover. Include token budget planner, selection reasons, and confidence scoring.

tasks.title: Implement context pack generation for review and implement modes
tasks.description: Wire ranking engine to produce ContextPack output for --mode review and --mode implement. Include explain-selection output showing why each item was selected, confidence, and estimated tokens. Show reduction vs baseline.

tasks.title: Build runtime/debug evidence parsers
tasks.description: Implement runtime package with parsers for: pytest output, Maven/Gradle test output, dotnet test output, generic stack traces, log ingestion. Publish normalized RuntimeSignal objects. Wire into --mode debug pack generation.

tasks.title: Build memory and decisions store
tasks.description: Implement memory package with: observation store, decisions store, memory search with FTS, stale memory flagging, and manual memory ingestion from session JSON. Wire into pack ranking so prior fixes and decisions surface in context packs.

tasks.title: Implement handover mode pack
tasks.description: Add --mode handover to pack command. Prioritize: changed files, decisions, remaining failures, open TODOs, next best actions. Generate structured handover summary artifact.

tasks.title: Build MCP server with v1 tools
tasks.description: Implement apps/mcp-server exposing: build_index, update_index, get_context_pack, get_debug_pack, search_memory, get_decisions, explain_selection, generate_handover. Support local stdio transport. Include JSON schema examples for every tool.

tasks.title: Build Claude Code adapter
tasks.description: Implement adapters-claude package as thin wrapper translating generic ContextPack into Claude Code consumable format. Include setup docs for connecting local MCP server from Claude Code CLI.

tasks.title: Build GitHub Copilot adapter
tasks.description: Implement adapters-copilot package generating: .github/copilot-instructions.md from project context, .github/agents/review.agent.md, .github/agents/debug.agent.md, .github/agents/implement.agent.md, .github/agents/handover.agent.md. Also expose context-router as MCP server for live Copilot tool calls.

tasks.title: Build Codex adapter
tasks.description: Implement adapters-codex package generating task prompts and subagent artifacts compatible with Codex CLI and App Server workflows. Include setup docs.

tasks.title: Build workspace and multi-repo support
tasks.description: Implement workspace package with: workspace registry, repo add/list/remove commands, cross-repo link inference from imports/OpenAPI/URLs/CI references, shared pack ranking with repo-aware output labels, branch/SHA tracking per repo. Support workspace.yaml config. Cap at 3 repos for v1.

tasks.title: Build benchmark harness
tasks.description: Implement benchmark package with reproducible task suite: 5 review tasks, 5 debug tasks, 5 implement tasks, 5 handover tasks across Python, Java, .NET, and multi-repo sample repos. Save JSON per run with: files selected, lines selected, estimated tokens, baseline tokens, reduction pct, latency, task success. Compare baselines: naive file reading, keyword search, graph only, graph+runtime, full router.

tasks.title: Create demo repos and example artifacts
tasks.description: Create sample repos for Python service, Java service, .NET service, and a 3-repo multi-repo workspace. Include demo scripts showing: index, pack, debug, benchmark run. Produce README charts with real measured numbers.

tasks.title: Write architecture.md and roadmap.md
tasks.description: Document module boundaries, data flow, plugin interfaces, ADRs for key decisions, and delivery roadmap by phase. Include repo tree and per-module responsibilities.

tasks.title: Add .context-routerignore and secrets masking
tasks.description: Implement path-based ignore file similar to .gitignore. Add secrets masking for logs and memory writes. Ensure no source upload by default and local database only.
